arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta tells Arsenal to switch transfer targets following major development
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta is now reportedly eyeing up Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong as his top transfer target in that position. arts.sum: Chido Obi chose to leave Arsenal in the summer and join Man Utd.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Lewis-Skelly warned about disciplinary 'thin line'
arts.sum: Arsenal's teenage left-back Myles Lewis-Skelly needs to understand "the line is really thin" if he is to avoid disciplinary issues during his career, says manager Mikel Arteta.

arts.ttl: Man Utd chiefs set to ditch Sir Jim Ratcliffe's project as Ruben Amorim reality sets in
arts.sum: Manchester United had been hoping to regain the Premier League title by 2028, but the huge task that is on Ruben Amorim's hands means that is looking increasingly unlikely

arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund looks shorn of confidence and is second-guessing himself right now, writes CHRIS SUTTON - this is how he can END 19-game Man United goal drought
arts.sum: CHRIS SUTTON: I've been where Rasmus Hojlund is right now at various points in my career where there is that slight hesitation in all aspects of his game.

arts.ttl: Developments see club ‘slow down’ move for Arsenal player – Could be tactic to put pressure on Gunners
arts.sum: Arsenal’s Albert Sambi Lokonga has been on loan at Sevilla since last summer and is keen on making his stay permanent. On February 5th, the midfielder publicly talked about his desire to continue with the La Liga side beyond the loan spell. Later that month, the Arsenal man’s agent had a meeting with Sevilla.
